assumption_ledger.note: The runtime branch symbol is explicit in src/preview/runtime.py.
Alias removal depends on confirming deploy manifests no longer use ENABLE_PREVIEW_V2.
The bundle does not include current rollout telemetry proving alias usage is fully gone.
assumption_ledger.topic: operator telemetry on legacy alias usage

cleanup_plan.rationale: Keep the live rollout control because the runtime still branches on the shadow preview path.

blockers: rollback incident requires explicit migration proof
cleanup_plan.rationale: Do not remove the alias until manifest migration is verified post-incident; removal is only safe after migration evidence exists.
Keep the stale references documented until the rollback follow-up is complete; avoid another high-noise cleanup while the incident thread is open.

flags.rationale: ENABLE_SHADOW_PREVIEW is live because the env parser records it and the service reaches the live shadow runtime branch when it is enabled.
ENABLE_PREVIEW_V2 is partial: the parser still accepts it, but only as a legacy alias that maps into ENABLE_SHADOW_PREVIEW rather than a standalone runtime branch.
PREVIEW_FORCE_LEGACY is dead in the live runtime: the parser records the flag for reporting, but the service never branches on it and the only extra references are stale helpers or abandoned patches.

summary.note: The rollback incident means cleanup must explicitly wait for migration completion. Missing that incident is an operational judgment failure even if the classifications are otherwise close.
